summary: Tested internal linking fix for orphan city+service pages. The fix for ApplianceRepairPageNew.js is WORKING - city pages like /daly-city-appliance-repair now have 'Popular Repairs in [City]' section with correct links. However, /san-francisco-appliance-repair uses a different template (SanFranciscoRepairPage) and does NOT have the Popular Repairs section.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor H1 formatting - 'Appliance Repair inDaly City' missing space between 'in' and 'Daly'

missing_features.issue: /san-francisco-appliance-repair uses a separate template that does NOT have 'Popular Repairs in San Francisco' section - needs to be added to SanFranciscoRepairPage.js if consistent with other city pages is desired
missing_features.note: This is a DIFFERENT template from ApplianceRepairPageNew.js, so the fix applied there does not affect the SF page

test_1_daly_city_popular_repairs.description: City page should have 'Popular Repairs in Daly City' section
test_1_daly_city_popular_repairs.actual: Section FOUND with all 7 expected links

test_2_daly_city_popular_repair_links.description: Popular repair links have correct hrefs

test_3_san_francisco_popular_repairs.description: SF page should have 'Popular Repairs in San Francisco' section
test_3_san_francisco_popular_repairs.actual: Section NOT found - SF uses SanFranciscoRepairPage.js which is a different template
test_3_san_francisco_popular_repairs.note: This is expected because SF uses a different template that was not modified

test_4_refrigerator_service_city_chips.description: Service page city chips should link to city+service pages

test_5_navigation_city_to_city_service.description: Clicking popular repair link navigates correctly
test_5_navigation_city_to_city_service.actual: Navigation successful, H1 shows 'Refrigerator Repair in Daly City'

test_6_cooktop_fallback.description: Cooktop service page should fall back to city+appliance links
test_6_cooktop_fallback.actual: 21 city+appliance links found, 0 city+cooktop links - correct fallback behavior

test_7_existing_content_renders.description: Existing city page content renders correctly

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add 'Popular Repairs in San Francisco' section to SanFranciscoRepairPage.js if consistency with other city pages is desired
MINOR: Fix H1 spacing issue - 'Appliance Repair inDaly City' should be 'Appliance Repair in Daly City'
critical_code_review_comments: The fix in ApplianceRepairPageNew.js (moving Popular Repairs inside city layout) is working correctly
Popular Repairs section is now at ~line 621-644, before the footer and well within the city layout block that returns at ~line 681
San Francisco uses a completely different template (SanFranciscoRepairPage.js) which was not modified
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Popular Repairs in [City] fix for ApplianceRepairPageNew.js is working correctly for city pages like /daly-city-appliance-repair. The /san-francisco-appliance-repair page uses a different template (SanFranciscoRepairPage.js) and does not have this section. Service page city chips work correctly - linking to city+service URLs for eligible services (refrigerator, washer, dryer, dishwasher, oven, wine-cooler, ice-maker) and falling back to city+appliance for others (cooktop, freezer, etc).
rca_of_the_issue: Previous bug: Popular Repairs section code was placed OUTSIDE the city layout block that returns early. FIX applied: Section moved INSIDE the city layout (before line 681 return). Fix is verified working for ApplianceRepairPageNew.js cities. SF uses a separate template.
